era_context: Fourth Dynasty Egypt under Khafre. Akkadian Empire in Mesopotamia. Indus Valley Civilization. Stable period of centralized state power and monumental construction.

historiographic_note: No contemporary records exist for this year. The historical record is blank. This is consistent with the broader pattern: ancient history is not documented year-by-year. Most years leave no trace.
